description: Delay information about a batch of flights

numTotal.description: Total number of flights in the the batch (including cancelled)

numQualifiedTotal.description:
Total number of flights in the batch, which were used to to calculate the
delay information (including cancelled). Should equal to or less than `NumTotal`.

The closer the value of this property to the value of `NumTotal`, the higher the
reliability of delay information

numCancelled.description: Total amount of flights in the batch

medianDelay.description:
Median delay of flights in the batch (format: [-]hh:mm:ss).
Value can be negative (therefore, means early occurence).

delayIndex.description: Normalized value on scale from 0.0 to 5.0 which corresponds with current amount of delays and cancellations in a given batch of flights (the less - the better).

name: FlightBatchDelayContract
